title: DeepSeek-V3 Reference
statement: DeepSeek-V3 provides an open-source 128K context MoE architecture rivaling GPT-5, making it a top open repo for reasoning-focused agents (DeepSeek-V3 2025).

title: Dify Platform
statement: Dify offers a production-ready, TypeScript-based stack for building agentic workflows with RAG + tool calling, simplifying the path from experimentation to deploy (Dify 2025).

title: AutoGen / Microsoft Agent Framework
statement: AutoGen introduces an event-driven multi-agent framework that scales conversation graphs and manages complex tool usage; pair with Semantic Kernel for multi-step gated loops.

title: OpenClaw & Moltbot
statement: OpenClaw (ex-Clawdbot/Moltbot) is a TypeScript MIT agent project that matured into a multi-channel automation stack; its skills registry teaches how to secure agentic endpoints before connecting to messaging APIs.

title: LangChain Core
statement: LangChain remains the connective tissue for agentic AI, composing chains, tools, memory, and multi-agent orchestration, with LangGraph and LangChain + LlamaIndex representing the RAG/memory layer (2026).

title: OpenHands / Dify Style
statement: Projects like Dify and OpenHands show how to build low-code, drag-and-drop agent platforms with built-in RAG, ReAct strategies, and TiDB-backed vector search; they serve as blueprints for Aurora’s UI wiring.

title: Research QwenLM/qwen-agent
statement: 请问qwen3.5的"reasoning_content"可以关闭吗 #791. New issue. Copy link. New issue. Copy link. Open. Open. 请问qwen3.5的"reasoning_content" ...

title: Research QwenLM/qwen-agent
statement: 请问qwen3.5的"reasoning_content"可以关闭吗 #791. New issue. Copy link. New issue. Copy link. Open. Open. 请问qwen3.5的"reasoning_content" ...

title: Research QwenLM/qwen-agent
statement: 当将qwen-agent 用于函数调用类工具时，若未安装soundfile 依赖（该依赖尚未在requirements.txt 中配置），导入qwen_agent.tools.base 模块会失败。

title: Research AuraHQ-ai/aura
statement: Aura is an AI team member with persistent memory using PostgreSQL + pgvector. After every exchange, a fast LLM extracts structured memories (facts, decisions, relationships, open threads) that are embedded and stored. Top ~10 most similar memories retrieved for context. Memory decay at 0.5%/day with floor at 0.01. Consolidation runs daily to merge duplicates via cosine similarity threshold (95%). This is the production-ready pattern for Aurora local memory.

title: Research Jannhsu/agent-memory
statement: Agent memory sin DB ni embeddings. Plugin extrae hechos de conversaciones via Gemini Flash, clasifica en 4 categorías (identity, knowledge, preferences, lessons) en archivos markdown. Agente carga skills via frontmatter. No requiere participación del agente para escribir memoria.

title: Research EvolvingAgentsLabs/evolving-memory
statement: Cognitive Trajectory Engine (CTE) - Topological memory graphs para LLM agents. Sueño cycles (SWS/REM/Consolidation) para consolidar experiencias. ISA (Instruction Set Architecture) para agentes. Graph traversal retrieval en lugar de flat similarity search.

title: Research microsoft/agent-framework
statement: Microsoft Agent Framework - Multi-language (Python/.NET) para construir, orquestar y deployar AI agents. Graph-based workflows con streaming, checkpointing, human-in-the-loop. Soporta Azure AI Foundry.

title: Research crewAIInc/crewAI
statement: CrewAI - Framework para role-playing autonomous AI agents. 46k+ stars. Multi-agent con crews (colaborative intelligence), flows (event-driven), tool use. 5.76x faster than LangGraph. Roles: PM, architect, engineer.

name: Remembra
description: AI memory with entity resolution, temporal decay, graph-aware recall. 100% accuracy LoCoMo.

name: Google AI Mode MCP
description: Google AI Mode research with citations, multilingual, free

name: Mem0
description: Universal memory layer for AI agents. +26% accuracy vs OpenAI Memory, 91% faster, 90% fewer tokens. Sub-50ms retrieval. Multiple memory types: working (short-term), factual (structured), episodic (events).
use_case: Production-ready memory with smart extraction, vector + graph support, multi-modal. Best for: real-time apps needing fast retrieval, personalization at scale

name: code-graph-mcp
description: MCP server que indexa codebase en AST knowledge graph. Reduce 40-60% tokens usando 9 herramientas: project_map (arquitectura), semantic_code_search (BM25+vector), trace_call_chain, find_dependents. 10 lenguajes: TS, JS, Go, Python, Rust, Java, C, C++, HTML, CSS. Incremental indexing con BLAKE3 Merkle tree.
use_case: Token optimization para Claude Code. Reemplaza 5-20 grep+read calls con 1 call. Essential para Aurora entender codebase sin quemAR tokens.

title: MCP Code Review Server
statement: MCP server for automated code review using Repomix + LLMs. Analyzes entire codebases, detects bugs, security issues, performance problems and best practices. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic and Gemini providers.

title: MCP Code Refiner
statement: Second-layer AI MCP server for code refinement and improvement. Provides security and performance analysis, diff view to preview changes before applying, apply with human confirmation.

title: Unified.to MCP Server
statement: 333+ integrations with 20,421 real-time tools. Zero data storage, compliance-ready. Regional: US, EU, AU.

title: Google Colab MCP Server
statement: Connect AI agents to Google Colab for cloud compute. Automate notebooks, execute code, create cells, visualize data.

title: LILT Enterprise Translation MCP
statement: Enterprise translation with human verification. Combines GenAI speed with brand-aligned quality. Expert linguist network for critical content.

title: Codebase Memory MCP - High-Performance Code Intelligence
statement: Ultra-fast C-based code intelligence engine for AI coding agents. Indexes entire repositories in milliseconds (Linux kernel 28M LOC in 3 minutes). Builds knowledge graph of functions, classes, call chains, HTTP routes. 14 MCP tools. Zero dependencies. Works with 10 coding agents. Built-in 3D graph visualization at localhost:9749. 884 stars.
features: LSP-style type resolution para Go, C, C++

title: Memory Graph - Graph DB-based MCP Memory for Coding Agents
statement: Graph-based MCP memory server for AI coding agents with intelligent relationship tracking. 165 stars. MIT license. Stores patterns, tracks relationships, retrieves knowledge across sessions. Supports SQLite (default), Neo4j, FalkorDB backends. 14+ relation types: USES, IMPLEMENTS, EXTENDS, CALLS, CAUSES, TRIGGERS, SOLVES, BUILDS_ON, etc.

name: nex
description: Persistent organizational context and memory for AI agents. Integrates 100+ tools (CRM, email, meetings, Slack), creates unified knowledge graph. trending #6 MCPMarket 25/03/2026
use_case: Cross-agent context sharing, knowledge graph queries
